case_id: Business Partner Group and Customer Creation

pi_items.source: Task.json description (line 7) explicitly specifies 'Name: Botanical Gardens' for the Business Partner Group to create. Verified against export_result.sh line 24 which queries 'WHERE name=Botanical Gardens'. Verified against verifier.py line 50 which references this group name in feedback.

Task.json description (line 6) explicitly specifies 'Search Key: BotGarden' for the Business Partner Group. Verified against setup_task.sh line 17 which deletes 'WHERE value=BotGarden'. Verified against verifier.py line 53 which checks 'group_data.get(search_key) == BotGarden'.

Task.json description (line 10) explicitly specifies 'Name: City Botanical Garden' for the Business Partner (Customer) to create. Verified against export_result.sh line 43 which queries 'WHERE name=City Botanical Garden'. Verified against verifier.py line 69 which references this partner name in feedback.

Task.json description (line 9) explicitly specifies 'Search Key: CITY_BOTANICAL' for the Business Partner. Verified against setup_task.sh line 16 which deletes 'WHERE value=CITY_BOTANICAL'. This value is used as the search key identifier in the database.

Environment uses iDempiere (confirmed by export_result.sh database queries to iDempiere PostgreSQL database). Version 12-release inferred from environment context consistent with other tasks in this environment.
Task description explicitly refers to 'Sales Operations Manager at GardenWorld' and setup_task.sh uses ad_client_id=11 which corresponds to GardenWorld per task_utils.sh line 27.

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic data - Business Partner Group and Customer records created within iDempiere during task execution, not sourced from external data
pi_items.source: Setup_task.sh explicitly deletes these records before task execution (lines 16-17), ensuring agent must create them. Export_result.sh queries database to verify creation, indicating these are test records created during the task.

pi_items.verified_value: ERP configuration task - Creating a Business Partner Group and linking a Customer (Business Partner) to it
pi_items.source: Task.json description (lines 5-15) defines the task as creating a new Business Partner Group and a new Business Partner (Customer) with specific attributes and linkages. Verifier.py (lines 14-87) confirms this task definition.

pi_items.verified_value: Database queries to iDempiere PostgreSQL database, checking table c_bp_group and c_bpartner for records with specified names and attributes
pi_items.source: Export_result.sh (lines 16-45) performs direct PostgreSQL queries to retrieve group_data and bp_data JSON objects from database tables. Verifier.py (lines 40-80) analyzes these objects to verify task completion.

privileged_info_summary: Task uses iDempiere 12-release, a real open-source ERP system, with the GardenWorld synthetic demo database. All metadata values are task specifications matching explicit requirements: create Business Partner Group 'Botanical Gardens' with search key 'BotGarden', then create Business Partner 'City Botanical Garden' with search key 'CITY_BOTANICAL' and assign it to the newly created group. Data is synthetic, created during task execution from scratch (pre-existing records are deleted during setup). Verification is done via direct PostgreSQL database queries checking creation timestamps and record linkages.
